star_1.text: I don't usually leave reviews but I just gotta with this game. Kind of fun for about an hour. A bit buggy in some parts. Ads are reeaaally bad. You get 2 upgrades you can buy and after that to get upgrades you have to watch ads. When you get to the "chest game" you have a chance to unlock new skins, except there is no chance involved whatsoever. You have to watch 2 ads so you can open all the chests, because it's always the last chest you unlock. And the "mystery chest" just gives you 500 stars.

Don't bother downloading this game, the game is basically here so that they can force ads on you. If I were you i'd look for another game, every time you complete a level it FORCES an ad Every.Single.Time and not only that but everything in this game requires you to watch an ad, and I mean EVERYTHING. You thought raid shadow legend ads were annoying? This game is that, but a hundred times worst.

If you want an enjoyable experience, this is not it. This "game" is riddled with ads for meaningless things, such as the chest at the end of each stage that you earn by playing. This would be more like an ad simulator more so than a game. Like, this game really just has a lot of ads everywhere, and in comparison, the gameplay is just uncreative, which from what I played, there just wasn't any passion put into this game, and seems like just another lazy game for a front for an ad generator.

There are ads after every level and you can't just press back to skip them. They are more and more annoying the more you see them. Even after getting a mystery box, you need to watch an ad to unlock it. The controls are garbage for any normal person not using a ridiculously expensive phone cuz it lags and throws you across the map and it's impossible to stay in the middle where you're supposed to be. Seriously, don't waste your time on this.

Just like every game to pass the time now. This one is full of ads. You are forced to watch an ad if you want to keep an item, and if that wasn't that bad part then when you say skip you don't want it. It forces you to watch an ad anyways. Every level you you have to watch another ad, and at the bottom of the screen is another banner ad. Ridiculous in every sense for a small game clearly not worth the time of the ads. Other than that, it is as stated above a good time passer and could be enjoyed

Looks good but lacks in rewarding the player for playing the game. If you don't have an internet connection you can't even open the gift box that you get by completing levels because it's locked behind an ad. Also, there are no rewards for doing a "perfect run" All in all its a good looking game like most games these days but it's made only for spamming the players with ads so the creator gets some money off of us. Would not recommend.

The game is ok, even slightly enjoyable at times, when your not being swarmed with ads, ads, that's what people complain about most, because the gameplay is quite decent it's just the ads ruin the experience, and you could pay to get the ads removed but the game isn't really that good, it's decent yes, but not worthy of your money.

The game has way to much ads. Its a fun game but i was trying to get the mystery box and because all of the rewards you had to watch a 15 to 20 second video. Everything in this game is ads all of the rewards are ads. I pressed no thank you on an ad reward pop up and it still bring me to a 10 second ad. Dont download this waste of time game becuase everything you do turns intp an ad 10 seconds later

I don't recommend this game at all the controls are to sensitive and when you go to the boxes with keys you have to watch adds to get more keys, and I know that's how they make money but the best prize, I'm pretty sure they game moves it because it was the last box I tried after I got two more sets of keys and that was the top prize. So I don't recommend it.

i enjoy it but since I like to call these ad scam games, i always just insta 1 star until they can be lighter-weight , you currently get an ad every round, and rounds don't last that long. oh also you can't keep any of the items you find on the runs because you'd have to watch and ad, so you click "lose it" and it doesn't matter anyways because they throw you right into an ad

Ok so fun game to pass the time. What annoys me about these obvious money grabbing games is that... You get an ingame item and it asks you "watch an add to keep, or to get an extra few keys" or "no thanks" If you click no thanks to expect to not watch an add....well tough luck because you have to watch an ad regardless. Uninstalled

It was a good game but the ADS HAD TO RUIN IT!!! Want to complete a level? WATCH AN AD! Want to keep a hat? WATCH AN AD! Having trouble with a level and you want to skip it? WATCH AND AD! If the devs are listening, Your game SUCK!!

Its terrible dont install it its an ad like every 2 or 1 levels which is way too often and to do anything literally anything watch an ad besides the chest minigame you wanna open your mystery box its an ad the devs feel way too greedy with this amount of ads and its laggy a goos bit of the time and its controls are suoer wonky dont download it

Would be cool to implement a slide or jump mechanic. Just smashing into obstacles with futility gets tedious. Play in airplane mode or you'll go crazy, but even then you'll miss out on almost all rewards.

Controls are really clunky, levels are boring and really easy, told me to watch an ad for a reward, tapped ok "no thanks" and it gave me an ad anyways. Pretty typical cheap mobile game with a gimmick that could be fun if the execution wasn't that terrible.

You saw two ad per game even you don't want to collect your prize clicking skip ad. This is not a good practice. You atlease need the player to build up some fun process before showing ad, and they show you the same ad over and over.

Ad simulator. The game is laggy on a current gen phone and honestly shouldn't be able to be laggy at all. If you see an ad button by the way it's not optional. No matter where you click on screen or even on your home button panel it'll pull up an ad.

Ads pop up nearly after every level, and you have to watch an ad to receive something that you earn during gameplay. Soulless cash grab of a game that otherwise is pretty fun for the time youre not watching freakin ads.

Ads with a little bit of game built around them. It could be fun if it actually required some skill and not tried to feed you an ad every single moment. I get that ads are important but this takes it too far

Looks good but isn't really challenging and there is an ad for everything, I uninstalled after opening chests and it asked me if I wanted to watch an ad to open more chests and I said no and it played an ad anyway with no extra chests.

star_2.text: So I was a little disapointed after day 3 the game gets stale pretty fast. The levels are all almost the same after a while. Once everything is unlocked its like now what not to mention at this point now instead of helpful the ads are just straight annoying. I actually at one point started making mental note never to use whats advertised. I mean yeah its a free game but once there is nothing left to unlock there really is no more point. But it was a time waster for a couple of days.

It's not that it's a bad game, it's just that EVERY. SINGLE. TRANSACTION. requires an ad. You won a prize? Ad. You unlocked something cool? Ad. You earned something special for doing good on a level? Ad. And it's not like it's just some random prize they offer you that requires an ad, it's things you literally EARN. And if you don't wanna watch the stupid ad, you don't get the prize. That you earned.

It's a fun little time waster but good lord the amount of ads is deplorable. Ads to keep items you find. Ads to unlocked the mystery chest you've "earned." Even ads when you skip either of those because you don't want to sit through another 30 second ad. I'd be more inclined to keep this app if it didn't stop me from playing every 20 seconds to watch an ad for some other hilariously misrepresented mobile game.

The game was laggy and extremely difficult to control the character. I played offline so i cant comment on ads or frequency, however, the game is boring and repetitive. The character moves way too fast, and zooms across the screen, causing the game to lag HARD.

Actually interesting for all of maybe five minutes. Skippable ads every other level, and any time you want to collect any rewards, you have to sit through an unskippable 30 second ad. The gameplay experience is not helped by how the game loves to have random lag spikes.

Yes, it is a pretty fun game. But the ads..Oh gosh. I get that you have to earn money, and I get the fact that you can turn off your wifi, but there still is a problem. Want to get a mystery box? You gotta watch an ad. Want to keep a hat that you got? Gotta watch an ad. Basically, if you turn off your wifi you get nothing. Wouldn't really recommend this game.

Wayyy too many ads, dont listen to the other reviews, every 2nd level, ad, want to actually earn something from the scratch tickets? 2 ads, want to earn a decent amount of in game currency? Ad, want to do anything really, ad, i dont like the new games coming out lately, they'd prefer to make a quick buck on a poor soul trying their project out, vs old games, they had no hads and costed 6.49 or had a decent amount of ads and had a great game to back it too. This is just sad, it couldve been dece

Read the reviews and gave it a chance - don't bother. The ads aren't mutable and you get full minute, unskippable ads within 2 minutes of playing. If you can get that far, game crashed within 30 seconds as well. Controls are meh and the core game itself isn't bad which is why it gets 2 stars.

It's a game that has SO much potential, and most of it have been executed probably, and greatly, but the killer of this game is no other than ad city, every level has an ad after it, all the prizes requires you to watch an ad, almost everything has got ads involved in it.
Really fun to play and I love it but there is an excessive amount of ads.. like after every single run. It's ridiculous. And it freezes mid run sometimes forcing me to close and reopen the app.

Pretty decent game but the same level each time. 1 ads after you finish game 2 like I said SAME LEVELS 3 not a lot to say about this game🤐 4 not a lot of updates 5 only thing I like about this game is that, it sharpens your brain like: The obstacles. Anyway yeah so uhm bai and uh yeahh so hope you read this all devolper and uhm yeah and hope you don't take us hating we just writing reviews.

THE ADS ARE ATROCIOUS!!! Literally after every short run, if you want to keep items, if you want FUN, you have to watch lengthy ads. The game itself could be entertaining, but the ads completely ruin it. Horrendous.

just another lame repetitive game that doesnt really have a point to it. no challenge and no fun to be had here.minimal ads if thats your big obsession but with this game more ads would at least give you some ideas for better games to download after you uninstall this dud.
Actually a pretty fun game, but the amount of ads and the length of them after every single short run makes it not worth my while. Deleted ot 10 runs in. Gave me a headache my gosh. Dont recommend.
Forced to watch ad after every game and sometimes it freezes and crashes so I have to relaunch. Fun game but too many unskipable ad videos...
Simple fun at the base, but the ads are WAY to often to be worth my time. Already uninstalled it after less than 30 minutes.
It was pretty hard to play and inorder to unlock good prizes in the prize box you needed to watch 2 ads and most of the time the second add would shut the game and I wouldn't get my prize
Played for 5 minutes, then got bored. It is only here as an AD FARM. Which is weird from this developer, because they have a really good game on here too- My Little Universe.
Its laggy, has too many ads and very repetative there are better FREE games out there that dont have ads pop up on your screen every ten seconds
Game is boring, levels are short, and you can get the rewards in like a week or two.

Game is good and satisfying but you need to have an ad FOR ALMOST EVERYTHING! Opening a chest needs an ad taking an item needs an ad. But other than that its a great game
Great concept, a bit repetitive, too many ads, not really a way to upgrade your character with abilities or even buy something that isnt purely cosmetic. Lot of potential but lacks in content

Love the game. But THE ADS... STOP PUTTING A SCREEN WHERE IT SAYS. ITEM FOUND. LOSE IT OR KEEP IT TO WATCH AN AD. EVERY GAME DOES THIS. PEOPLE R GETTING SICK 🤮 OF IT. ADS EVERY AFTER LEVEL HUH. Three out of five cuz there is one problem of the game the thing is some of the levels needs more phisics cuz for example i go the jumping thing right and then i was supposed to go to the other jumpy thing but i get by jumped over the jump thing then me die So yeah

Pretty nice game, but i realize i have to take a substanable amount of damage before i can move properly. If im nearly fully health, i teleport from side to side and cant walk in the middle unless im nearly dead
It's fun to have only your head left actually there should be a mode where you can rampage through the city and try to cause as much destruction as possible
The problom is that you never get the best prize in the key boxes and the ads always says "ad not ready". Its just annoying.
Really laggy, makes the game less fun. The sensitivity is so high. Overall I hate it
Its ok but the ads are very annoying. The gameplay is pretty good though
My fingers are to big can't see where I'm walking or moving. Would work better for a woman with small hands or a child. Is it supposed to jump over obstacles as well?
Too many ads!!!!!! If you want someone to like your game make it enjoyable
Whenever you press no thanks for watching an ad, it still shows an ad.
so good game but its so crazy there was not hard levels or long levels plss get a long and hard leves. thanks😀
I put it half because bad news:lots of ads good news:its so fun.
Somehow good but when I bought ad free there was still loads of ads thats a scam!!!! 😤
The game is good but the boost is terrible it goes so fast that I can hit stuff easy get rid of it
Basic and simple which is good early in the game but in the later part boring
Pretty good concept of a game but the moving sensitivity is just ridiculous

star_4.text: Let me start with THE AD for the game doesnt lie. The game is very fun. I'm at level 150 atm. Ads are annoying but you can mute them. Some ads are useful in order to unlock stars( you can build a thousand in no time even without ads) the unlockables are fun to mess with. There are purchasable items but there is no need nothing you but makes you faster or anything but that's ok. I recommend. I'd give 5 stars but the ads could be cut down a little

So far its fun, An normal id give 5 stars, however, it takes a lot of stars to get new stuff, it be nice , and more. "hooking, or grabbing" to most i beliebe if there were just some weaker, smaller, and cheaper items that wrre available alot sooner in the game, or maybe just some the existing items be cheaper. I like the 1st idea myself but I know its a ton easier said than done. TY FOR THIS GAME !!! , IT IS FUN!!!!

Yeah theres ads, but i just usally put it in airplane mode. Only had the game for a week or two and i have everything unlocked. Its pretty fun to play. My only issue is i got to level 295 and theres a wall preventing me from advancing. Idk if this is a glitch or its supposed to be like this. But overall not bad.

This game is no scam, there is no false advertising and the game it self is overall fun. The controls are a bit janky in my opinion but still playable. There is no paywall but their are ads. I mean a lot of ads but hey, no microtransactions right?
It's, like, an actually good mobile game. While the gameplay isn't exactly what I'd call challenging, it's not totally braindead, nor does it totally bombard you with ads.

Really fun but gets boring after a little bit and also the key chests are obviously rigged I only got it in the last chest after having to watch 2 ads make it more possible to win a skin instead of having to watch 2 ads to get one overall fun game.

The game is really fun and it is good to play when you have nothing to do although one thing that can be fixed is the lag and the controls are to sensitibe besides that i'd say the game is really good.
The game is great and its fun but the broblem is it kind the lag and the adds pops every time. But overall the game is good and you can costomize your character's appearance.

An honestly fun game that stays true to its advertising! But the ads can be a little overwhelming...
it's fun but could use more variety like level/maps and objectives like collect this many keys and get a bonus chest.

This game is really good it's really accurate and stuff you should make a second version of it instead of block it could be a slime or something else but cool game

star_5.text: Honestly the gameplay is amazing and the graphics are perfect. I also love how you're able to freely move around and stop whenever. But in my opinion the game is too easy so maybe you could remove most of the blocks that heal you to make it a little more difficult. And also make the ending a little longer where you turn into a giant ball and roll around, that part was fun but too short. The ads were fine and short for me since you only get an ad at the ending and not when you die. Great game!

I thought this game was going to be a game filled to the brim with ads and I thought wrong the only way you can get ads if you choose to get the awesome rewards this game gives you and the ads are worth it. I have never wanted to watch an ad so badly to get a skin. Also you can get really good items to customize your character with. This is a I never expected to really like. Good job developers!
